title: ononis tridentata var. intricata
intro: Ononis tridentata var. intricata, commonly known as the spiny restharrow, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The spiny restharrow has been used to treat various health issues such as urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin conditions due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote urine production. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Ononis tridentata var. intricata are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
